title: Tupa decurrens
taxonomy: Tupa decurrens is classified in the plant family Annonaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Tupa, which is part of the larger order Magnoliales. The family Annonaceae is a group of flowering plants that are commonly known as the custard apple family. Tupa decurrens is a member of the dicotyledonous plants, characterized by having two cotyledons in their seeds. It is a species of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of the Americas.
uses: Tupa decurrens. Unfortunately, there is limited information available on the medicinal uses of Tupa decurrens. benefits: Tupa decurrens has been traditionally used in folk medicine, and research suggests that it may possess various health benefits.
